summary: Identified multiple doc-claimed features not implemented or mismatched in scripts/agents. Most gaps are in SKILL.md orchestration features and AGENTS.md/README claims vs actual bin/* behavior.

findings.gap: SKILL.md SQL persistence (stampede_runs/tasks/workers tables) not implemented in scripts
findings.evidence: No sqlite/sql usage in bin/*.sh; all state stored in JSON/filesystem.

findings.gap: Resume/status subcommands documented but launcher lacks flags
findings.evidence: bin/stampede.sh has no --resume/--status; only stampede-monitor.sh provides status UI.

findings.gap: Sealed test generation (pre-run) documented but not implemented
findings.evidence: bin/stampede-merge.sh only runs pre-existing sealed-tests if present; no generator exists.

findings.gap: PID-based dead-worker recovery documented but monitor only does time-based orphan recovery
findings.evidence: bin/stampede-monitor.sh requeues stale claims after ORPHAN_RECOVERY_AFTER; no PID heartbeat check.

findings.gap: Telemetry ping documented but not implemented in scripts
Merger agent launch documented but stampede-merge.sh does not invoke Copilot CLI agent
findings.evidence: bin/stampede-merge.sh is standalone bash/python; no copilot/agent invocation present.

findings.gap: AI semantic conflict resolution documented but merge script only strips markers for simple cases
findings.evidence: bin/stampede-merge.sh:159-185 performs marker removal and skips complex conflicts.

findings.gap: Runtime stats integration documented but monitor doesn"t create runtime-stats.json
findings.evidence: bin/stampede-monitor.sh:307-325 only updates runtime-stats.json if it exists; otherwise exits.
bin/stampede.sh arg parser has no --task option.

findings.gap: COPILOT_SKILL_TELEMETRY env var documented but not read

findings.evidence: bin/stampede-merge.sh:113-124 sorts ascending (smallest first); docs conflict.

findings.gap: Scored merge report lacks per-score justifications

notes: No documented CLI flags appear missing; README usage flags are implemented (bin/stampede.sh:32-42).
README also has minor inconsistencies (e.g., "Six files land" count, merge order phrasing).
